scriptRules.stage_0: Romanization is temporary support only. Hangul is the target from the first stage.
scriptRules.stages_1_3: Hangul only in the main lesson flow; Romanization remains a helper field for nervous beginners.
scriptRules.stages_4_6: Natural Korean, register control, and practical real-life fluency — not obscure exam trap content.

stages.label: Starter
stages.description: Absolute zero to practical starter. Hangul first, then real-life Korean with romanization as temporary support only.

items.meaning: there is not / do not have
I will eat well / thanks for the meal

stages.label: Beginner
stages.description: A1–A2. Everyday Korean for greetings, food, directions, home, and basic survival in Korea.

items.meaning: it is my first time meeting you
do you have a bigger size?

stages.label: Explorer
stages.description: A2–B1. Connected Korean, polite vs casual choices, and practical daily conversation.

items.meaning: how have you been these days?
I like tea more than coffee
about how many minutes does it take?
I want to go to Gangnam
does this subway stop at Hongdae?
I am eating at home today
I will eat at home today
I went to Korea last year
thank you for your hard work
that is a bit... / maybe not

stages.label: Speaker
stages.description: B1. Real conversation, explanation, preference, emotional language, and service/work Korean.

items.meaning: I am reaching out after a long time
what have you been up to lately?
it is an honor to meet you
I am not good with spicy food
can I get it to go?
please make it a warm tea
can I enter with this card?
it does not suit my skin
it is a bit expensive, but the quality is good
I gradually got used to it
in the end I did not go
I will send it for now
I will take a look / consider it
I think it will be difficult this time
it is kind of unclear / awkward
read the room / be mindful of the situation

stages.label: Scholar
stages.description: B2. Nuanced Korean for work, study, social situations, and clearer natural sounding expression.

items.meaning: I am Kim Minsu from the sales team
thank you always for your help
I ask for your support again
if we look at it as a premise
if we think about it the other way
by the end of this month
I do not want to burden them
it is a culture of helping each other
it would be good to confirm in advance
would you be able to handle this?
it is lighter than it looks
I had been curious for a while
I cannot accept it / it does not convince me
so it does not get awkward
something still bothers me a little
I will check again just in case
I will be heading out first
you have to read the room

stages.label: Specialist
stages.description: C1 practical mastery. Rich, modern Korean for real life in Korea without disappearing into obscure edge-case content.

items.meaning: thank you for making time today
I have wanted to talk about this for a long time
let me introduce myself once more
if we organize the premise first
we cannot say that is always the case
in the mid to long term
I can see the rough outline
is there something that could replace it?
the material texture is quite nice
I do not want to burden them for no reason
it is not that I want distance
I tend to put things off
we need to hurry the response
I did what needed to be done
we proceeded because there was no choice
how it feels in actual use
it is easier to use than I thought
we need to monitor how it goes
it is good for the price
it took a bit of a roundabout path, but
I do not want it to become emotional

units.title: Cultural: Natural Korean in Real Life

sessions.title: Cultural: Natural Korean in Real Life

items.meaning: we must have a connection / fate

items.target: 말 안 해도 알 줄 알았어요
items.romanji: mal an haedo al jul arasseoyo
items.meaning: I thought you would know without me saying it

stages.label: Archivist
stages.description: Archivist loop. Maintenance, nuance, review, sandboxing, and Vault preparation rather than fake completion screens.

items.meaning: make it stick in the body / internalize it
if it sounds awkward, please correct me right away
move to the next deeper stage
not let it wash over you
continue even if it is fuzzy
see an explanation through to the end
that was a little off just now
the meaning gets across, but it is awkward
use different materials for different jobs
do not rely only on dictionaries
learn by writing it out by hand
keep going even if it is short
change through a single tone choice
choose in line with the culture

exchanges.translation: Can I help you with your order?

exchanges.prompt: Order an iced Americano and ask for it to go.
exchanges.modelAnswer: 아이스 아메리카노 하나 주세요. 포장해 주세요.

exchanges.prompt: Say you are going to Hongdae and ask if you need to transfer.
Say it was helpful but a little long.
Say your throat has hurt since yesterday.
Suggest getting coffee first and then going to the bookstore.
exchanges.modelAnswer: 먼저 커피 마시고 그다음에 서점에 가자.

exchanges.translation: From now on, you choose your own depth.

exchanges.prompt: Say you want to strengthen listening and practical conversation first.
exchanges.modelAnswer: 먼저 듣기와 실전 회화를 더 강화하고 싶어요.

phraseLibrary.translation: I do not know / I am not sure
phraseLibrary.grammarNote: Softened way to say you are not sure.

phraseLibrary.translation: Please say that one more time
phraseLibrary.grammarNote: Useful for listening recovery without sounding rude.

phraseLibrary.translation: I am a little busy right now
phraseLibrary.grammarNote: Natural, soft way to say you are busy.

phraseLibrary.translation: Excuse me, may I ask your name again?
Honestly, I am a little anxious
